# techco.lab Design System — Context for Claude Code

## Colors

| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| Dark BG | `#4C4D58` | Cover, dark slides, impact sections |
| Light BG | `#F9FAFB` | Content slides, light sections |
| Accent Green | `#02B793` | Primary accent, CTAs, highlights |
| Accent Light | `#0AD4A8` | Gradient end (accent) |
| Accent Dark | `#007167` | Gradient start (title text on light) |
| Accent Soft | `#8AC6BD` | Gradient end (title text on light) |
| Text Primary | `#2A2A2A` | Headlines on light bg |
| Text Body | `#4A4A4A` | Body on light bg |
| Text on Dark | `#FFFFFF` | Any text on dark bg |
| Text Muted Dark | `rgba(255,255,255,0.45)` | Secondary labels on dark bg |
| Text Muted Light | `rgba(76,77,88,0.5)` | Secondary labels on light bg |

### Classification Badges

| Level | BG | Text |
|-------|----|------|
| For internal use only | `#FFD944` | `#000000` |
| Confidential | `#E8872A` | `#FFFFFF` |
| Strictly confidential | `#D42B2B` | `#FFFFFF` |

## Gradients

```css
/* Title text — light backgrounds */
background: linear-gradient(135deg, #007167, #8AC6BD);
-webkit-background-clip: text;
-webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;

/* Accent bar / progress fill */
background: linear-gradient(90deg, #02B793, #0AD4A8);

/* Glassmorphism card — dark bg */
background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.14) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.06) 50%, rgba(2,183,147,0.08) 100%);
backdrop-filter: blur(40px) saturate(200%);
border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);

/* Glassmorphism card — light bg */
background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(76,77,88,0.06) 0%, rgba(76,77,88,0.03) 100%);
backdrop-filter: blur(24px);
border: 1px solid rgba(76,77,88,0.08);
```

## Typography (1920×1080 canvas scale)

| Element | Size | Weight | Notes |
|---------|------|--------|-------|
| Hero title | 4.5rem | 700 | letter-spacing: -0.02em |
| Slide title | 3.1rem | 700 | letter-spacing: -0.025em, line-height: 1.25 |
| Subtitle | 1.7rem | 500–600 | — |
| Eyebrow | 1.05rem | 500 | UPPERCASE, letter-spacing: 0.2em |
| Body | 1.4rem | 400 | — |
| Body small | 1.25rem | 400–500 | — |
| Big numbers | 8rem | 700 | letter-spacing: -0.03em |
| Card title | 2rem | 700 | — |

PPTX fallback: `Calibri` (bold for headers, regular for body), `Consolas` for monospace.

## Visual Motifs

### Green vertical bar bullet
```jsx
<span style={{
  width: '4px', height: '1.1em', marginTop: '0.2em',
  backgroundColor: '#02B793', borderRadius: '2px', flexShrink: 0,
}} />
```

### Green accent line (under card titles)
```jsx
<div style={{
  width: '48px', height: '3px', borderRadius: '2px',
  background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, #02B793, #0AD4A8)',
}} />
```

### Classification badge (every slide, top-right, pill shape)
```jsx
const badgeConfig = {
  'internal': { bg: '#FFD944', color: '#000000', text: 'For internal use only' },
  'confidential': { bg: '#E8872A', color: '#FFFFFF', text: 'Confidential' },
  'strictly-confidential': { bg: '#D42B2B', color: '#FFFFFF', text: 'Strictly confidential' },
};

function ClassificationBadge({ level }) {
  const cfg = badgeConfig[level];
  return (
    <div style={{
      position: 'absolute', top: 20, right: 64, zIndex: 10,
      background: cfg.bg, borderRadius: 999, padding: '10px 36px',
    }}>
      <p style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 500, color: cfg.color, whiteSpace: 'nowrap', margin: 0 }}>
        {cfg.text}
      </p>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## Logo — SVG Inline Component

Use this exact SVG. Never substitute with plain text.

### White variant (dark backgrounds)
```jsx

  return (

  );
}
```

## Logo Placement Rules

| Context | Position | Size | Variant |
|---------|----------|------|---------|
| Cover / dark slides — top right | `position: absolute; top: 88px; right: 64px` | 160px wide | White |
| Content slides / light — footer bottom left | `position: absolute; bottom: 32px; left: 64px` | 120px wide | Green |

## Spacing (1920×1080 canvas)

| Token | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Padding top | 4.05rem |
| Padding bottom | 5.74rem |
| Padding horizontal | 4rem |
| Card gap | 2.4rem |
| Standard card height | 420px |

## Background Alternation Pattern

Start dark → alternate → end dark.

| Slide | Background |
|-------|------------|
| Cover | `#4C4D58` (dark) |
| Slide 2 | `#F9FAFB` (light) |
| Impact / numbers | `#4C4D58` (dark) |
| Closing | `#4C4D58` (dark) |
